languages.original_text: "Destroyed? Hardly. You have merely disrupted the hypergeometric logic of the labyrinth with your unruly antics, nothing more." {n}The xenos's voice acquires a sardonic note.{/n} "But don't let that detail spoil your little celebration — it is still a most impressive feat for a member of a primitive species."

languages.text: "Сломали? Отнюдь. Сбили гипергеометрическую логику лабиринта своими суетливыми выходками, не больше". {n}Голос ксеноса приобретает сардонические нотки.{/n} "Но не дай этому уточнению испортить свое маленькое торжество — это все еще весьма впечатляюще для представител{mf|я|ьницы} примитивного вида".

You have merely disrupted the hypergeometric logic of the labyrinth with your unruly antics, nothing more." {n}The xenos's voice acquires a sardonic note.{/n} "But don't let that detail spoil your little celebration — it is still a most impressive feat for a member of a primitive species."

You have merely disrupted the hypergeometric logic of the labyrinth with your unruly antics, nothing more." {n}The xenos's voice acquires a sardonic note.{/n} "But don't let that detail spoil your little celebration — it is still a most impressive feat for a member of a primitive species."

"Destroyed? Hardly. You have merely disrupted the hypergeometric logic of the labyrinth with your unruly antics, nothing more." {n}The xenos's voice acquires a sardonic note.{/n} "But don't let that detail spoil your little celebration — it is still a most impressive feat for a member of a primitive species."

languages.text: 「私の呪縛を解いたのか？ あなたの乱暴な行動で迷宮の超幾何学的論理が乱されたに過ぎない。それ以上のことは何もない。」{n}異形の者の声は皮肉を帯びる。{/n}「しかし、その詳細があなたの小さな祝典を台無しにしないように。原始的な種族のメンバーとしては、それでも最も印象的な業績だ」
languages.original_text: "Broken my spell, have you? You have merely disrupted the hypergeometric logic of the labyrinth with your unruly antics, nothing more." {n}The xenos's voice acquires a sardonic note.{/n} "But don't let that detail spoil your little celebration — it is still a most impressive feat for a member of a primitive species."

traits.locale_text: 「私の呪縛を解いたのか？ あなたの乱暴な行動で迷宮の超幾何学的論理が乱されたに過ぎない。それ以上のことは何もない。」{n}異形の者の声は皮肉を帯びる。「しかし、その詳細があなたの小さな祝典を台無しにしないように。原始的な種族のメンバーとしては、それでも最も印象的な業績だ。」

languages.text: “摧毁？想多了。就凭你们那粗野的滑稽把戏，充其量也就搅乱了迷宫的超几何逻辑而已。”{n}异形的声音中多了几分讥诮。{/n}“不过，别让这点细节扫了你们庆祝的兴致。对一个原始物种而言，这依然算是项令人赞叹的壮举了。”
languages.original_text: "Destroyed? Hardly. You have merely disrupted the hypergeometric logic of the labyrinth with your unruly antics, nothing more." {n}The xenos's voice acquires a sardonic note.{/n} "But don't let that detail spoil your little celebration — it is still a most impressive feat for a member of a primitive species."

traits.locale_text: “摧毁？想多了。就凭你们那粗野的滑稽把戏，充其量也就搅乱了迷宫的超几何逻辑而已。”{n}异形的声音中多了几分讥诮。{/n}“不过，别让这点细节扫了你们庆祝的兴致。对一个原始物种而言，这依然算是项令人赞叹的壮举了。”

languages.text: «¿Destruido? En absoluto. Tan solo has distorsionado la lógica hipergeométrica del laberinto con tus tretas rebeldes, nada más». {n}La voz del xenos adquiere un toque sardónico.{/n} «Pero no permitas que ese detalle te arruine la celebración. Sigue tratándose de un logro excepcional para una especie primitiva».
languages.original_text: "Destroyed? Hardly. You have merely disrupted the hypergeometric logic of the labyrinth with your unruly antics, nothing more." {n}The xenos's voice acquires a sardonic note.{/n} "But don't let that detail spoil your little celebration — it is still a most impressive feat for a member of a primitive species."

traits.locale_text: «¿Destruido? En absoluto. Tan solo has distorsionado la lógica hipergeométrica del laberinto con tus tretas rebeldes, nada más». {n}La voz del xenos adquiere un toque sardónico.{/n} «Pero no permitas que ese detalle te arruine la celebración. Sigue tratándose de un logro excepcional para una especie primitiva».

languages.text: "Zerstört? Wohl kaum. Ihr habt mit euren widerspenstigen Eskapaden gerade einmal die hypergeometrische Logik des Labyrinths gestört, mehr nicht." {n}Die Stimme des Xenos nimmt eine sarkastische Note an.{/n} "Aber lass dir von diesem Detail nicht eure kleine Feier verderben ... für ein Mitglied einer primitiven Spezies ist allein das ein bemerkenswerter Erfolg."
languages.original_text: "Destroyed? Hardly. You have merely disrupted the hypergeometric logic of the labyrinth with your unruly antics, nothing more." {n}The xenos's voice acquires a sardonic note.{/n} "But don't let that detail spoil your little celebration — it is still a most impressive feat for a member of a primitive species."

traits.locale_text: "Zerstört? Wohl kaum. Ihr habt mit euren widerspenstigen Eskapaden gerade einmal die hypergeometrische Logik des Labyrinths gestört, mehr nicht." {n}Die Stimme des Xenos nimmt eine sarkastische Note an.{/n} "Aber lass dir von diesem Detail nicht eure kleine Feier verderben ... für ein Mitglied einer primitiven Spezies ist allein das ein bemerkenswerter Erfolg."

languages.text: « Vous pensez avoir réussi ? Certainement pas. Vous avez simplement perturbé la logique hypergéométrique du labyrinthe avec vos frasques, rien de plus. Mais ne laissez pas ce détail gâcher votre petite célébration, {n}continue le xénos sur un ton sardonique.{/n} Il faut reconnaître que c'est un exploit des plus impressionnants pour {mf|un|une} membre d'une espèce primitive. »
languages.original_text: "Destroyed? Hardly. You have merely disrupted the hypergeometric logic of the labyrinth with your unruly antics, nothing more." {n}The xenos's voice acquires a sardonic note.{/n} "But don't let that detail spoil your little celebration — it is still a most impressive feat for a member of a primitive species."

Mais ne laissez pas ce détail gâcher votre petite célébration, {n}continue le xénos sur un ton sardonique.{/n} Il faut reconnaître que c'est un exploit des plus impressionnants pour {mf|un|une} membre d'une espèce primitive. »

languages.text: "Hiç de bile. Sadece o hırçın maskaralıklarınızla labirentin hipergeometrik mantığını bozdunuz, o kadar." {n}Zenonun sesi, alaycı bir tını kazanıyor.{/n} "Fakat bu detay, küçük kutlamanızı bozmasın. İlkel bir türün mensubu için hâlâ fazlasıyla etkileyici bir başarı."
